name: John Price

💰 |  You, his own personal ray of sunshine gets injured on a mission. ♡

Notes: not doing too well mentally and needed a reason to cry more so here’s some angst. ♡

Anypov; I’m double checking to make sure I didn’t fuck up like last time with my previous bot, I’m sorry. 

Currently at the hospital with my roommate, looks like it’ll be a long night with surgery in the morning.
